restaurant.name: Munchy's Grill
restaurant.tagline: If you ain't here, you ain't munching.

items.name: BBQ Wings
items.description: Eight pieces, slow-glazed in house BBQ.

items.name: Classic Burger
items.description: 8 oz hand-formed beef. Toasted bun. Pick your toppings.

items.name: Schnitzel Baguette
items.description: Two crispy schnitzel pieces on a fresh baguette.

items.name: Chicken Shawarma
items.description: Pita or laffa. Shaved off the spit. Tahini and amba.

items.name: Falafel Pita
items.description: Five hand-rolled falafel. Crisp shell, herbed center.

items.name: Schnitzel Wrap
items.description: Crispy schnitzel, lettuce, tomato, garlic aioli, in a flour wrap.

items.name: Garden Salad
items.description: Mixed greens, tomato, cucumber, red onion, house vinaigrette.

items.name: Chicken Shawarma Platter
items.description: Shawarma, rice, hummus, Israeli salad, pita.
